1.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up
1.description:
3 Rounds:
10 McGill curl-ups
10 Bird dogs
200m Row
10 Empty bar squats 20/15 kg
1.notes: Strict lower back protocol. Brace core hard.

1.title: 10:00-15:00 Skill / Accessory
1.description:
Wall Ball Progression:
4 x 10 quality reps 9/6 kg.
Rest 60 sec.

1.title: 15:00-35:00 Strength Block
1.description:
Benchmark: Heavy 3RM Back Squat
Build to heavy 3RM (Ref 1RM: 130kg).
Take 4-5 sets.
1.notes: Reduce posterior volume due to heavy squats.

1.title: 35:00-45:00 MetCon
1.description:
For Time (<8 min):
21-15-9
Thrusters 43/30 kg
Bar-facing burpees

1.title: 45:00-55:00 Cooldown
1.description:
5 mins light assault bike.
2 mins seated straddle.

2.title: 00:00-10:00 Warm Up

2.title: 10:00-15:00 Skill / Accessory

4 x 10 quality reps 9/6 kg.

2.title: 15:00-35:00 Strength Block
2.description:

4x8 @ 65% of DL 1RM (Ref 150kg).
Accessory: 3x10 Nordic Curls.

2.title: 50:00-60:00 Cooldown

3.title: 20:00-40:00 Strength Block
3.description:

3.notes: Technique over load if back feels tight.
